name: BB + RSI Mean Reversion
author: @DaviddDotTech
source: X post, Apr 2023 — backtested on TradingView

long: Price touches or closes below lower Bollinger Band
ADX is below 20 (ranging market — regime filter)
Enter at open of next candle
short: Price touches or closes above upper Bollinger Band
ADX is below 20 (ranging market — regime filter)
Enter at open of next candle

exit_rules.take_profit_primary: Price returns to middle band (20 SMA)

risk_rules: Mean reversion strategy — do NOT use in trending markets
Best on: SPY, QQQ, major Forex, BTC/ETH in ranges
Worst: strong directional trends — price walks the band

trending_skip: Price on same side of middle band 10+ candles

red_flags: Price walking the band (3+ candles touching upper/lower)
Only one condition met (need both BB touch + RSI extreme)

BB+RSI Range Q2-24.error: Replay start failed: Replay failed to start. The selected date may not have data for this timeframe. Try a more recent date or a higher timeframe (e.g., Daily).

BB+RSI Bear Q1-25.error: Replay start failed: Replay failed to start. The selected date may not have data for this timeframe. Try a more recent date or a higher timeframe (e.g., Daily).

_recommendations: BTC 1H: Win rate above 60% — solid foundation
BTC 1H: Profit factor above 1.5 — strategy has edge
BTC 1H: Profit factor above 2 — strong strategy
